messages.message: Unexpected any. Specify a different type.

suggestions.desc: Use `unknown` instead, this will force you to explicitly, and safely assert the type is correct.
Use `never` instead, this is useful when instantiating generic type parameters that you don't need to know the type of.

messages.message: React Hook useCallback has an unnecessary dependency: 'saveGame'. Either exclude it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [financials, perfScore, player, currentGig, lastGigStats, updatePlayer, addToast, changeScene, activeStoryFlags, addQuest, setlist, t]

fix.text: [financials, perfScore, player, currentGig, lastGigStats, updatePlayer, addToast, changeScene, activeStoryFlags, addQuest, setlist, t]

suppressedMessages.message: Do not call the 'set' function 'setPostOptionsError' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setPostResult' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setPhase' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setPostOptionsError' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.

messages.message: React Hook useEffect has a missing dependency: 'randomFn'. Either include it or remove the dependency array.

suggestions.desc: Update the dependencies array to be: [isPoweredOn, isGameOver, isShocked, unconnectedIds, connections, isWinningRef, setSocketOrder, randomFn]

fix.text: [isPoweredOn, isGameOver, isShocked, unconnectedIds, connections, isWinningRef, setSocketOrder, randomFn]

messages.message: Do not use item index in the array as its key.

suppressedMessages.message: Do not call the 'set' function 'setLogs' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setPrevEventId' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setOutcome' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setPreviewError' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
Do not use item index in the array as its key.

messages.message: Do not call the 'set' function 'setEntries' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
A ref identifier must be named 'ref' or ending in 'Ref'.

A ref identifier must be named 'ref' or ending in 'Ref'.
Do not call the 'set' function 'setMoneyAnim' of 'useState' synchronously in an effect. This can lead to unnecessary re-renders and performance issues.
